## FINDINGS
VERDICT: REJECT
1. billing_dates.py:11 — `calendar.monthrange(year, d.month)` should be `calendar.monthrange(year, month)` — the code clamps to the current month's max day instead of the target month's, causing dates like Jan 31 → Feb 31 to raise ValueError instead of clamping to Feb 28/29.
